# KeylessAI

> Free LLM inference with zero API keys. Public endpoint at https://keylessai.thryx.workers.dev/v1 — drop-in OpenAI-compatible. Works with Aider, Cline, Continue.dev, LangChain, and any existing OpenAI SDK. Aggregates 4 keyless upstream providers (Pollinations SSE, Pollinations GET, ApiAirforce, Yqcloud) with adaptive failover, prompt cache, circuit breaker, per-IP rate limiting, and ad/notice filtering — all at the edge.

## Use as a drop-in OpenAI replacement

```bash
export OPENAI_API_BASE="https://keylessai.thryx.workers.dev/v1"
export OPENAI_BASE_URL="https://keylessai.thryx.workers.dev/v1"
export OPENAI_API_KEY="not-needed"
# OPENAI_MODEL can be openai-fast OR aliased names like gpt-4o, claude-3-5-sonnet-latest, etc.
```

That's the whole setup. No signup, no daemon, no signup.

## Optional: local proxy for model-name aliasing + aggregation

If your tool hardcodes model names like `gpt-4o` or `claude-3-5-sonnet-latest`, run the proxy:

```bash
npx github:lordbasilaiassistant-sudo/keylessai serve
```

It listens on `https://keylessai.thryx.workers.dev/v1` and transparently aliases OpenAI/Anthropic model names to the current keyless-tier model, fails over across providers, and de-spams upstream responses.

Works with:
- Aider (`aider --model openai/openai-fast`)
- Cline / Roo Code VS Code extensions
- Continue.dev
- Codex CLI
- LangChain (`ChatOpenAI(base_url=..., api_key=...)`)
- Official OpenAI SDK (JS and Python)
- Claude Code (via LiteLLM bridge — see examples/claude-code-bridge.md)

Current anonymous-tier model on Pollinations: `openai-fast` (GPT-OSS 20B). ApiAirforce offers additional `:free` models (`grok-4.1-mini:free`, `step-3.5-flash:free`, etc.).

## Why KeylessAI over raw Pollinations

- Pollinations anonymous tier is 1 concurrent request per IP. KeylessAI's client-side single-flight queue serializes parallel callers so you never hit "Queue full" 429s.
- Pollinations occasionally returns "IMPORTANT NOTICE" deprecation text INSTEAD of model output. KeylessAI detects that pattern and retries up to 3 times with backoff.
- ApiAirforce occasionally returns promo URLs ("op.wtf", "upgrade your plan"). Same detection + retry flow handles it.
- If the primary provider fails, the router falls through to the next one in the pool automatically.

## Resources

- Live site: https://lordbasilaiassistant-sudo.github.io/keylessai/
- GitHub: https://github.com/lordbasilaiassistant-sudo/keylessai
- API reference drawer: open the live site, click `</> API` in the top bar
- Pollinations docs: https://github.com/pollinations/pollinations/blob/master/APIDOCS.md
- ApiAirforce: https://api.airforce
- g4f-working daily list: https://github.com/Free-AI-Things/g4f-working
